changeSet.author: Hoang Manh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_GET_COPY_TRADING_MARKET_LEADER_LIST' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_GET_ML_PROFILE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_GET_CURRENT_PORTFOLIO' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_GET_HISTORICAL_PORTFOLIO' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_GET_HISTORICAL_PORTFOLIO_ALL_STOCKS' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_DAILY_PROFIT_LOSS' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_SUBSCRIBER_GROWTH_RATE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-ALL-BROKER-PROFILE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-BROKER-PROFILE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-ALL-CHAT-ROOM' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-CHAT-ROOM' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'NON-LOGIN';
